title: Hallelujah
excerpt:
(minuto 3 segundo 59) …  Baby I have been here before I know this room, I’ve walked this floor I used to live alone before I knew you. I’ve seen your flag on the marble arch Love is not a victory march It’s a cold and it’s a broken Hallelujah   Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah … 
Llegir més…
